_publications._publicationTitle: Susceptible stages in Schwann cells for NF1-associated plexiform neurofibroma development.

_contextSnippet: the P0 tam;PLPCre-ERT2;NF1 flox/− mice began to show signs of lethargy, weight loss and paralysis at five to six-months of age requiring that they be sacrificed
details: 100% of P0 tamoxifen-induced PLPCre-ERT2;NF1 flox/− mice developed plexiform neurofibromas at 5-6 months of age
